hub_subtitle: Business English from the ground up -- your work, your team, your routine

lesson.menu_desc: Describe the best and the biggest -- the fastest, the most reliable, the best -- with superlative adjectives -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 20 -- Superlatives -- Superlative Adjectives
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Danilo Febba | Aula 20 -- Superlatives

listenings.text: Hi, I am Rachel. Let me tell you about the best tools on our team. Python is the fastest tool for big files, and it is the most reliable. Our new dashboard is the most popular tool in the company, because it is the most modern. This year, our biggest success was the new pipeline. It gives us the highest quality and the best results. On Fridays, we process the largest amount of data, a huge amount. The new server is the most powerful of all, and it is our top choice. For me, this is the strongest team and the best year so far.

Hello, this is Danilo. Let me share the highlights of our year. Our biggest project was the new data platform. It was the most complex, but also the most successful. We had the fastest growth in the company, and the best results in three years. The cloud gives us the highest quality and the largest amount of storage. Our top tool is Python, the most efficient of all. The old system was the worst for big files, so we changed it. This was the best decision of the year. I am very proud of my team. This is our top result so far.
